title: Rotterdam Hydrogen Network Pipeline Filled with Green Hydrogen
content: The first major pipeline section of the Dutch hydrogen network in Rotterdam has successfully been filled with green hydrogen, marking a critical milestone for European energy infrastructure. Gasunie subsidiary Hynetwork oversaw the operation, pumping 32 tonnes of green hydrogen into a 32km pipeline segment. This pipeline connects the Port of Rotterdam with local industrial users and will eventually link to the national grid and the Delta Rhine Corridor, extending connectivity into Germany and North-Western Europe. The filling process was executed in partnership with Plug Power Inc., utilizing cleaner fuel transported from northern Germany. This development lays the foundation for a broader hydrogen market, supporting industrial decarbonization and enhancing energy security across the region.
author: Analysts Account
